compiled_state.title: Implement stamp_artifact() function and version stamp embedding in dso-setup.sh
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Testing Mode
UPDATE

## Description
Add a centralized stamp_artifact() function to plugins/dso/scripts/dso-setup.sh that embeds version stamps in all 4 host-project artifacts after installation. This follows the established dso-setup.sh pattern of utility functions (detect_prerequisites, supplement_template_file, merge_precommit_hooks) called from the procedural main body.

### Implementation steps:
1. Read plugin version from plugins/dso/.claude-plugin/plugin.json at script start:
   ```bash
   _PLUGIN_VERSION=$(python3 -c "import json; print(json.load(open('$_DSO_PLUGIN_DIR/.claude-plugin/plugin.json'))['version'])" 2>/dev/null || echo "unknown")
   ```
2. Create stamp_artifact() function with signature: stamp_artifact FILE_PATH STAMP_TYPE VERSION DRYRUN
   - STAMP_TYPE "text": insert/update `# dso-version: <version>` — for shim (after line 1, within first 5 lines), for config (prepend or update existing)
   - STAMP_TYPE "yaml": insert/update `x-dso-version: <version>` as top-level YAML key — use python3+yaml if available, sed fallback
   - Idempotent: if stamp already exists, update version in-place; if not, insert
3. After all copy/merge operations in main body, add stamping phase:
   ```bash
   stamp_artifact "$TARGET_REPO/.claude/scripts/dso" text "$_PLUGIN_VERSION" "$DRYRUN"
   stamp_artifact "$CONFIG" text "$_PLUGIN_VERSION" "$DRYRUN"
   stamp_artifact "$TARGET_PRECOMMIT" yaml "$_PLUGIN_VERSION" "$DRYRUN"
   stamp_artifact "$TARGET_REPO/.github/workflows/ci.yml" yaml "$_PLUGIN_VERSION" "$DRYRUN"
   ```
4. Append `.claude/dso-artifact-check-cache` to host project .gitignore (if not already present):
   ```bash
   if ! grep -qF '.claude/dso-artifact-check-cache' "$TARGET_REPO/.gitignore" 2>/dev/null; then
       echo '.claude/dso-artifact-check-cache' >> "$TARGET_REPO/.gitignore"
   fi
   ```

### Files to modify
- plugins/dso/scripts/dso-setup.sh

## File Impact
| File | Action |
|------|--------|
| plugins/dso/scripts/dso-setup.sh | modify |

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `bash tests/run-all.sh` passes (exit 0) — all RED tests from Tasks 1 and 2 turn GREEN
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] stamp_artifact function exists in dso-setup.sh
  Verify: grep -q 'stamp_artifact()' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/dso-setup.sh
- [ ] Running dso-setup.sh on a temp dir produces `# dso-version:` in shim first 5 lines
  Verify: T=$(mktemp -d) && bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/dso-setup.sh "$T" "$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso" >/dev/null 2>&1 && head -5 "$T/.claude/scripts/dso" | grep -q '# dso-version:' && rm -rf "$T"
- [ ] Running dso-setup.sh produces `x-dso-version:` in .pre-commit-config.yaml
  Verify: T=$(mktemp -d) && bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/dso-setup.sh "$T" "$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso" >/dev/null 2>&1 && grep -q 'x-dso-version:' "$T/.pre-commit-config.yaml" && rm -rf "$T"
- [ ] Running dso-setup.sh twice does not duplicate stamps (idempotent)
  Verify: T=$(mktemp -d) && S=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/dso-setup.sh && bash "$S" "$T" "$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso" >/dev/null 2>&1 && bash "$S" "$T" "$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso" >/dev/null 2>&1 && test $(grep -c '# dso-version:' "$T/.claude/scripts/dso") -eq 1 && rm -rf "$T"
- [ ] .gitignore includes .claude/dso-artifact-check-cache
  Verify: T=$(mktemp -d) && bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/dso-setup.sh "$T" "$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso" >/dev/null 2>&1 && grep -q 'dso-artifact-check-cache' "$T/.gitignore" && rm -rf "$T"

## Escalation Policy
Proceed unless a significant assumption is required to continue. Document all assumptions made without escalating.
